commands.review_summary:
The PR projects `sessions_send` inter-session user turns as assistant-side forwarded WebChat messages, strips their prompt envelope, and lets assistant groups show sender attribution.

PR surface: Source +92, Tests +103. Total +195 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows `sessions_send` creates user-role inter-session turns, while current WebChat display/grouping lacks a `sessions_send` forwarded projection; I did not run a live browser repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor action is needed for real WebChat behavior proof before normal maintainer merge review can finish; there is no narrow code repair for ClawSweeper to apply.

target.title: fix(webchat): show sessions_send handoffs as forwarded
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #89161.

- Project `sessions_send` inter-session user turns as assistant-side WebChat display messages while preserving the persisted transcript `role: "user"` contract.
- Strip the generated inter-session prompt envelope from visible forwarded content.
- Let WebChat assistant groups use `senderLabel`, so forwarded messages render with source attribution such as `Forwarded from main` instead of appearing as `You`.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/sessions/input-provenance.test.ts src/gateway/session-history-state.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/build-chat-items.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts`
- `pnpm format:fix src/gateway/chat-display-projection.ts src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts src/sessions/input-provenance.ts src/sessions/input-provenance.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/build-chat-items.ts ui/src/ui/chat/build-chat-items.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.ts ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm tsgo`
- `pnpm tsgo:test:ui`
- `pnpm tsgo:core:test`

Known proof gap:

- `pnpm check:test-types` timed out locally before completion; split relevant core/UI lanes passed.
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions:test` also timed out locally. This patch does not touch `extensions/`.
- Manual WebChat two-agent path was not run locally.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: `sessions_send` inter-session messages no longer render as right-side user-authored WebChat bubbles; display projection marks them as assistant-side forwarded messages with sender attribution.

Real environment tested: Local source checkout, Node/Vitest/tsgo lanes listed above.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: See Verification.

Evidence after fix: Added regression coverage for gateway display projection, provenance envelope stripping, WebChat grouping, and sender label rendering.

Observed result after fix: All listed targeted Vitest, format, diff, core type, and UI type checks passed.

What was not tested: Live browser WebChat reproduction; full combined `check:test-types`; extensions test type lane.
